bundles.name: Agent Architect
bundles.audience: For designing agent systems, orchestration, and multi-agent execution.
bundles.description: For designing agent systems, orchestration, and multi-agent execution.

skills.summary: Design production-ready autonomous agent systems.
Select safe autonomous execution patterns.
Structure agent routing and coordination flows.
Compose specialized agents without chaos.
Build stateful graph-based agent workflows.
Implement crew-style role delegation.

bundles.name: LLM Application Developer
bundles.audience: For building production LLM apps with retrieval, structure, and operational control.
bundles.description: For building production LLM apps with retrieval, structure, and operational control.

skills.summary: Apply production-ready LLM application patterns.
Design retrieval pipelines and grounded answers.
Reduce latency and cost with prompt caching.
Use context budget where it matters most.
Enforce schemas and stable machine-readable outputs.
Implement typed LLM applications with Pydantic AI.

bundles.name: Prompt Engineering
bundles.audience: For designing precise prompts, reusable prompt assets, and reliable outputs.
bundles.description: For designing precise prompts, reusable prompt assets, and reliable outputs.

skills.summary: Write high-signal prompts for programming LLMs.
Choose prompt patterns by task shape and failure mode.
Organize reusable prompts and system instructions.
Combine prompts with schema-constrained outputs.
Design tool contracts that LLMs can call reliably.

bundles.name: Context & Memory
bundles.audience: For long-running sessions, memory hierarchy, and context quality control.
bundles.description: For long-running sessions, memory hierarchy, and context quality control.

skills.summary: Model context windows, relevance, and token budgets.
Assign agents explicit context responsibilities.
Compress state without losing decision-critical details.
Protect prompt boundaries and instruction integrity.
Design memory for persistent agent workflows.
Choose memory layers and retrieval strategies.
Expose memory over MCP-compatible interfaces.

bundles.name: Evaluation & Ops
bundles.audience: For measuring quality, controlling failures, and operating LLM systems safely.
bundles.description: For measuring quality, controlling failures, and operating LLM systems safely.

skills.summary: Test agent behavior against explicit goals.
Build repeatable evaluation loops for model quality.
Operate LLM systems with cost and reliability discipline.
Constrain risky tool execution paths.
Manage UI-driving agents and their failure modes.
Automate targeted context gathering before execution.

bundles.name: MCP & Framework Tooling
bundles.audience: For tool interfaces, MCP servers, and framework-specific agent implementations.
bundles.description: For tool interfaces, MCP servers, and framework-specific agent implementations.

skills.summary: Build MCP servers and tool surfaces cleanly.
Define tool schemas and invocation rules that agents follow.
Structure LangChain-based agent applications.
Use typed agents and validation-oriented flows.
Integrate Claude-oriented application patterns safely.
